paragrafi.codicePlSql:
select * from comb_hst.detail_hs  where 
value='70761930590' and 
name='transaction_id'
--name='tracking_id'

select a.* from comb_hst.action_hs a,comb_hst.action_msg_hs b 
where  b.id=a.message_id and a.request_id=136024538

paragrafi.codicePlSql:
select dis.* from detail d, discard2detail d2d , discard dis
where d.value  ='620172762110'
and d.id = d2d.id_detail
and d2d.id_discard = dis.id_discard  
and dis.receiver_name like '%Rec%'

select * from (
select a.id,a.name,a.request_id req_id,--e.document_xml,
(regexp_match(c.document_xml, '"ServiceExternalId"\s*:\s*"(0[^"]*)"'))[1] ServiceExternalId,
(regexp_match(c.document_xml, '"ServiceActiveDt"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"'))[1] ServiceActiveDt,
(regexp_match(e.document_xml, '<pfx18:idOrdine>\s*([^<\s]+)\s*<'))[1] AS id_ordine,
(regexp_match(e.document_xml, '<pfx18:idAccount>\s*([^<\s]+)\s*<'))[1] AS id_account
from 
action a,
fault b ,
fault_doc c ,
request d,
request_doc e
where a.name='New SI Kenan' 
and a.status='FA' 
and b.action_id=a.id
and c.id=b.document_id 
and a.ts_created > current_date-100 
and d.id=a.request_id
and d.document_id=e.id
and c.document_xml  like '%TRIG: INSERT/UPDATE Failed: Overlapping active/inactive dates%'
) where ServiceExternalId is not null
